calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court noted that it is 9:15 a.m. and there is no appearance by Mr. Muhammad and at the last hearing Mr. Muhammad was asked to file a declaration of due diligence. No declaration has been received/filed. The petition to establish fact of birth is denied.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Maloney. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Jan-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hakim Muhammad in Propria Persona.

Mr. Muhammad stated that he has his first identification card that was issued in Los Angeles and his school identification, that it has his date of birth, that his Mother is deceased and that he has no contact with any of his friends or relatives from Los Angeles. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth was continued to January 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Muhammad to file a declaration regarding all efforts made to obtain a birth certificate/declaration of due diligence.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)
